aries.horoscope_text: Because your tendency recently has been to brood over everything, Aries, a day like this can't be anything but beneficial. It has been difficult for you to find material satisfaction of late, but today offers you a view into the world of the intangible and unreal. You may find it especially gratifying to participate in an artistic or religious activity.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — you're in your feelings about tech debt, not your codebase.
aries.prophecy: The stars point you toward art and spirit today. You will refactor for 'elegance.' No one will notice but you. 🎨

taurus.horoscope_text: There are days when you feel wonderful without being able to attribute the feeling to any real event. Of course, your rational mind will search for a reason for the happiness. If you count the number of times when you do things against your will or better judgment, it becomes obvious that logic and reason don't always apply to this world. Don't even try to understand, Taurus, just enjoy!
taurus.deploy_today: Yes — logic says no, vibes say ship it.
taurus.prophecy: The stars say don't overthink today. Your code works and you don't know why. Don't ask. Just ship. 🙃

gemini.horoscope_text: The day ahead should be excellent. You've been searching for meaning behind recent events. No doubt there have been a lot of changes both at work and at home. You're bursting with new ambition. Today, Gemini, you're likely to put all these experiences into the hopper, stir them up, and be grateful for the thrilling life you lead right now! You may not get a specific answer. Sometimes feeling grateful is an answer all its own.
gemini.deploy_today: Yes — chaos energy, but the good kind.
gemini.prophecy: The stars say stir up all your recent changes and trust the process. Your merge conflicts do not share this optimism.

cancer.horoscope_text: You'll probably be perfectly in tune with the day ahead, Cancer. Of course, there are days when it's tempting to run away from the reality of the moment and its hardships. At times like today, you're so compassionate that you find it easy to listen to others, and life is truly rewarding. People find your company soothing and pleasant, and they are likely to thank you for it.
cancer.prophecy: The stars say your empathy will be rewarded today. Three teammates will Slack you 'quick question' instead of reading the docs.

leo.horoscope_text: Don't even try to understand what's happening today, Leo, because you won't be able to fathom it. Collective currents of concern are imposing upon your life and you're powerless to stop them. Some soul searching may help. True, at the moment you do feel like you're just a grain of sand in a vast universe, but is that really so bad?
leo.deploy_today: No — powerless-against-collective-forces energy is not a deploy strategy.
leo.prophecy: The stars say forces beyond your control are shaping today. Translation: someone broke main and it wasn't you. 😵‍💫

virgo.horoscope_text: You no longer seem to know what you want. Work or time off? Redecorate your house or live in a beach shack? Communication feels difficult because you're uncertain about your own perspective. Rather than forcing clarity, disconnect from routine activities and take a walk. This moment of confusion is temporary and will resolve naturally.
virgo.deploy_today: Maybe — you can't decide, so let CI decide.
virgo.prophecy: The stars say you can't choose between two paths today. React or just more useEffect? Take a walk. The bug will still be there.

libra.horoscope_text: Carefully consider whether working abroad genuinely aligns with your career goals, Libra. Examine whether relocating represents authentic opportunity or serves as an escape from workplace dissatisfaction. Introspect on this question, as important professional decisions depend on understanding your true motivations rather than pursuing what may seem appealing from a distance.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — half your brain already updated its LinkedIn.
libra.prophecy: The stars say reflect on whether the grass is greener elsewhere. It's not. It just has a newer JS framework.

scorpio.horoscope_text: Today won't be like most other days, Scorpio. Look around and you'll see that people either have their heads in the clouds, are depressed, or seem to be trying to keep up a good front. The planetary atmosphere is such that a lot of people - and you in particular - feel frustrated by an inability to realize their dreams. This is a difficult situation to be sure. Know that it will pass.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — everyone's faking calm and the CI is definitely not calm.
scorpio.prophecy: The stars say today is unlike any other. Standup will confirm: everyone is fine. No one is fine. 😤

sagittarius.horoscope_text: If you were offered the opportunity to take a trip around the world, where you would see wonderful palaces and experience a timeless love affair, would you take it? The freedom would tempt you, without a doubt, but would it make you happy, Sagittarius? Have you considered the possibility that you can create an environment here at home that gives you that same sense of freedom?
sagittarius.deploy_today: Maybe — you're mentally already on a different team's Slack channel.
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars say you're dreaming of adventure elsewhere. Reminder: WFH from the couch is also technically travel. 🧳

capricorn.horoscope_text: Today might be a bit difficult, Capricorn, because you aren't likely to be as productive as usual. You won't have much to say, and you'll feel sleepy and somewhat grumpy. In other words, it's the perfect day to go back to bed with that novel. Take a nap - or several naps - and follow your desire to do as little as possible. There will be plenty of time to catch up on work.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — you and productivity are not on speaking terms today.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars say rest today, Capricorn. Your standup update will be one word: 'blocked.' 😴

aquarius.horoscope_text: Pride comes before a fall, Aquarius. Despite recent smooth circumstances, be cautious of your current emotional state. Be mindful of how you're treating your romantic partner, as you may be disappointed by their reaction — though the real issue is that you've lost touch with reality yourself.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — your confidence peaked before code review started.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars say pride comes before a fall. You said 'this PR is clean' out loud. It was not clean. 👀

pisces.horoscope_text: It will be as though you're in a new, hopeful world today, Pisces. The people you meet will be cordial and caring, and the future will seem like a bright, attractive place to live. In other words, you feel as though you're living in a fabulous dream. Alas, the alarm clock is bound to wake you up soon. Enjoy the sweet reality of the day ahead while it lasts.
pisces.deploy_today: Yes — enjoy it, prod hasn't found out yet.
pisces.prophecy: The stars say today feels like a beautiful dream. That's staging. Prod is the alarm clock. ⏰
